visual_dna.product_description: The Pigeon Air Fryer is a sleek and modern kitchen appliance designed for versatile cooking functions such as frying, defrosting, roasting, grilling, and baking. It features a compact, rounded design with a glossy dark green finish accented by gold trims, giving it a premium aesthetic. The top panel includes a digital touch interface with illuminated icons for easy operation. Its pull-out basket is ergonomically designed with a gold-accented handle for convenience.

materials.texture_description: smooth and polished surface with minimal texture

lighting.shadow_characteristics: soft shadows cast to the right and below the product

structure.overall_shape: rounded rectangular with a slightly tapered top

motion_recommendations: slow 360-degree rotation to showcase the design
zoom in on the digital touch panel
pull-out motion of the basket to highlight functionality
camera_angle_suggestions: front angle to show the digital panel and handle
top-down angle to highlight the touch interface
side angle to emphasize the gold accents and basket design
